atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: John reports an abnormal lab finding, including a high blood sugar and a recent diagnosis of diabetes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing significant stress and strain over the past couple of weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports not monitoring his sugar intake closely during this time.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports elevated blood sugar levels.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient was treated in the emergency room for the high blood sugar and has been placed on metformin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing anxiety.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies recent seizures.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that his last epilepsy evaluation was approximately three months ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no chest pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no shortness of breath.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no nausea.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no vomiting.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no dizziness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has experienced some trace pitting edema to his lower extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's recent high blood sugar levels and elevated hemoglobin A1c indicate a new diagnosis of diabetes mellitus.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports anxiety.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals clear lung sounds.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals a regular heart rhythm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is trace pitting edema to the lower extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A blood glucose level of 162 mg/dL was recorded.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Hemoglobin A1c is 8%.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will continue the patient on metformin 500 mg twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will schedule a follow-up appointment in four weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will also recommend a referral to a therapist to address his anxiety.
